OPFVTT.RegisterForTypes: Actor types to register the sheet for
OPFVTT.RegisterForTypesHint: Comma separated list of Actor types in the active system that this sheet should be selectable for (e.g. 'character' or 'character,npc'). After changing this, reload the world.
OPFVTT.MakeDefault: Make this the default sheet for those Actor types
OPFVTT.MakeDefaultHint: If on, this sheet is set as the default for the configured Actor types. If off, GMs and players pick it manually via the sheet's header button.
